Title: My New Project Specification
Description: Short description of a Project in few words

Functionality.BaseFunctionality: Base functionality, for e.g.: Login,Registration,Load Video/Pictures etc.
Functionality.ListOfScreens: List of screens in the project

Competitors.YourMainFeature: My main feature in the project is ...

HighLoad.Performance: How many users will use this project a day
HighLoad.Database: Size of database or how many users will use this project
